title: Recalls - Canada.ca
content:
The Recalls and Safety Alerts Database provides easy access to a comprehensive list of recalls, advisories, and safety alerts. This database includes recalls from Health Canada, the Canadian Food Inspection Agency, and Transport Canada.
Legal Disclaimer Statement
- Adverse reactions, medical device incidents and health product recalls in Canada: 2019 summary report [2020-12-11]
- Product Recall Procedures
- Health Products and Food Branch Inspectorate - Recall Policy (POL-0016)
